metadata.source: GitHub REST API starred repositories endpoint
metadata.list_limitation: GitHub REST starring endpoints expose starred repositories and topics, but not user-created star lists.

category.name: AI Agents and Orchestration
category.description: Agent frameworks, autonomous workflows, tool use, MCP, and multi-agent systems.

category.name: LLM Applications and Chat
category.description: Chat apps, copilots, prompt tooling, assistants, and applied LLM products.

category.name: RAG, Memory, and Knowledge Systems
category.description: Retrieval, vector search, embeddings, long-term memory, and knowledge graph systems.

category.name: Code Agents and Developer Tools
category.description: Coding assistants, CLIs, IDE tooling, code search, and software engineering automation.

category.name: Automation, Browser, and Workflow Ops
category.description: Browser automation, RPA, schedulers, scrapers, and workflow automation platforms.

category.name: Data, Research, and Analytics
category.description: Research tooling, datasets, notebooks, analytics, data extraction, and evaluation.

category.name: Image, Video, and Generative Media
category.description: Image generation, video generation, diffusion, multimodal creation, and creative AI.

category.name: Audio, Speech, and Music
category.description: Speech, transcription, voice, music generation, audio processing, and listening systems.

category.name: Frontend, UI, and Design Systems
category.description: Frontend frameworks, UI components, visualization, and design systems.

category.name: Infrastructure, Platform, and Observability
category.description: Deployment, cloud, databases, queues, observability, containers, and platform engineering.

category.name: Security and Privacy
category.description: Security research, privacy tools, auth, sandboxing, secrets, and defensive engineering.

category.name: Science, Bio, and Healthcare
category.description: Biology, chemistry, medicine, health, scientific computing, and lab automation.

category.name: Business, Sales, and Productivity
category.description: Business automation, CRM, marketing, finance, productivity, and operations tooling.

category.name: Education, Docs, and Content
category.description: Documentation, learning resources, courses, publishing, and content tooling.

category.name: General Development
category.description: Useful repositories without a stronger category signal.

repository.name: agent-memory-kit
repository.description: Toolkit for agent memory and retrieval experiments.
repository.llm_use: Use to design retrieval, memory, semantic indexing, and knowledge-grounded LLM systems.

repository.name: playwright-ops
repository.description: Browser automation workflows for agent operations.
repository.llm_use: Use to build operational automations, browser workflows, and repeatable task pipelines.
